member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.RecallMessageFunction
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for sending messages from the bot.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.RecallMessageFunction.MaxDeliveryCountForDeadLetter
member.summary: This is set to 10 because the default maximum delivery count from the service bus message queue before the service bus will automatically put the message in the Dead Letter Queue is 10.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.RecallMessageFunction.Run(System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for sending messages from the bot.
Process send notification response.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunction
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for sending messages from the bot.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunction.MaxDeliveryCountForDeadLetter
member.summary: This is set to 10 because the default maximum delivery count from the service bus message queue before the service bus will automatically put the message in the Dead Letter Queue is 10.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunction.Run(System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for sending messages from the bot.
Process send notification response.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunctionOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the Company Communicator Send Function.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunctionOptions.MaxNumberOfAttempts
member.summary: Gets or sets the max number of request attempts.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.SendFunctionOptions.SendRetryDelayNumberOfSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of seconds to delay before retrying to send the message.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService
member.summary: Notification service interface.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.IsSendNotificationThrottled
member.summary: Checks if the send notification is throttled.
member.returns: true if the send notification is throttled, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.IsPendingNotification(Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Common.Services.MessageQueues.SendQueue.SendQueueMessageContent)
member.summary: Checks if the notification is pending.
member.returns: true if the notification is pending, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.SetSendNotificationThrottled(System.Double)
member.summary: Set SendNotification Throttled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.UpdateSentNotification(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates sent notification for the recipient.
member.param: The recipient's unique identifier. If the recipient is a user, this should be the AAD Id. If the recipient is a team, this should be the team Id.
The total number of throttled requests to send the notification.
A comma separated list representing all of the status code responses received when trying to send the notification to the recipient.
The error message to store in the database.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.IsPendingRecallNotification(Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Common.Services.MessageQueues.SendRecallQueue.SendRecallQueueMessageContent)
member.summary: Check if pending recall notification.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.IsSendRecallNotificationThrottled
member.summary: Check if sent recall notification is throttled or not.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.INotificationService.UpdateSentRecallNotification(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update sent recall notification.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.Services.NotificationService
member.summary: Notification Service.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The global sending notification data repository.
The recall sent notification data repository.

member.summary: Configures the worker to register extension startup services.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.FunctionExecutorHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to enable registration of the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.summary: Configures an optimized function executor to the invocation pipeline.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.FunctionExecutorAutoStartup
member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.GeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider
member.summary: Custom implementation that returns function metadata definitions for the current worker."/>

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.WorkerHostBuilderFunctionMetadataProviderExtension
member.summary: Extension methods to enable registration of the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.WorkerHostBuilderFunctionMetadataProviderExtension.ConfigureGeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the GeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider to the service collection. During initialization, the worker will return generated function metadata instead of relying on the Azure Functions host for function indexing.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.FunctionMetadataProviderAutoStartup
member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Send.Func.FunctionMetadataProviderAutoStartup.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.
